ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "total_bugs" INTEGER /* Total number of bugs reported for the project */,
  "total_functions" INTEGER /* Total number of functions in the project */,
  "quality_score" TEXT /* Composite score representing the overall quality of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the project to which the function belongs */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "cyclomatic" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "modified" INTEGER /* Number of times the function has been modified */,
  "strict" INTEGER /* Strictness of adherence to coding standards */,
  "essential" INTEGER /* Essential metric value for the function */,
  "nesting" INTEGER /* Nesting level of the function */,
  "path_count" INTEGER /* Total path count in the function */,
  "bug_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs associated with the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function */,
  "function_size" INTEGER /* Size of the function in lines of code (LOC) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the function was modified */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the function was created */,
  "owner" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who owns the function */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation or comments related to the function */,
  "test_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of the function covered by tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the function being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (user) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the code review */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Score for the code review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the code review */,
  "review_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the code review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_over_time" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the function the metrics belong to */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "cyclomatic" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity on the recorded date */,
  "modified" INTEGER /* Number of times the function was modified on the recorded date */,
  "bug_count" INTEGER /* Number of bugs reported on the recorded date */,
  "function_size" INTEGER /* Size of the function in lines of code (LOC) on the recorded date */,
  "test_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of the function covered by tests on the recorded date */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Average review score of the function on the recorded date */,
  "documentation_score" INTEGER /* Quality of documentation on the recorded date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_over_time_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the role was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the function where the bug exists */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bug */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the bug */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the team */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the action */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or section of the system where the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to perform the action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
